title: Expecting read-only properties to be ignored when creating a MODEL CAR BRAND
gherkin:
When the user creates a "MODEL CAR BRAND" "Hot Wheels" with the following data
  | key | value | datatype |
  | name | Hot Wheele | string |
  | founded | 1968 | number |
  | defunct |  | number |
  | id         | 1234       | number   |
  | created_at | 2025-01-01 | string   |
  | updated_at | 2025-01-01 | string   |
Then the response should contain an ID
And the response should contain the following keys
  | key        |
  | created_at |
  | updated_at |
But the response should NOT contain the ID 1234
And the response should NOT contain the following properties
  | key        | value      | datatype |
  | created_at | 2025-01-01 | string   |
  | updated_at | 2025-01-01 | string   |
